hero.title: Free Online VBO, MoTeC, AiM & NMEA Telemetry Viewer
hero.subtitle: Drop in a datalog and explore your laps — maps, charts, sectors and video sync. Everything runs locally in your browser. No upload, no account required.

footer.previewWarning: This branch is running on a preview database — accounts can be wiped at any time. Do not rely on data being saved anywhere other than locally. If payments are activated, do not enter real payment information.
